response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a deeply accomplished engineer with 15+ years of experience, currently serving as Staff Software Engineer at Google following a senior role at Meta — a profile that dwarfs the entry-level scope of this position. While his technical skills (TypeScript, React, AWS, AI/LLM tooling, Kubernetes) satisfy and exceed all listed requirements, the seniority mismatch is so extreme that mutual satisfaction is implausible: the role is scoped as an individual contributor doing foundational platform work, whereas the candidate operates at a staff/principal level on high-scale distributed systems. Additionally, PostgreSQL is not evidenced in the resume (MongoDB and MySQL are), and Nest.js is absent, leaving two of the preferred stack choices unconfirmed.
strengths: TypeScript and React expertise demonstrated at production scale across Meta and Google
AI/LLM and agentic infrastructure experience at Google directly maps to the nice-to-have qualifications
Strong software craftsmanship discipline (TDD, trunk-based development, CI/CD) across multiple senior engagements
concerns: Extreme overqualification — Staff Engineer at Google applying for an entry-level role creates an untenable seniority and compensation mismatch
No evidence of PostgreSQL experience; relational database work is limited to MySQL and SQL mentions with primary NoSQL (MongoDB) usage
No Nest.js mentioned despite it being a core framework preference for the role

key_factors.factor: TypeScript, React, AWS, and LLM technical fit
